_comment: Fallback Canon entry rendered when canon_entries DB table is empty. Loaded by _load_stub() in homepage_renderer.py; superseded by _fetch_canon_live() when available. Slug is composed as <list_slug>/<entity_slug> so the homepage CTA /canon/<slug>.html resolves to a real file on disk.

entry.title: Caleb Williams: The 2024 Heisman That Wasn't
entry.summary: Williams won the 2022 Heisman as a sophomore at USC, finished sixth in 2023, and went undrafted-in-the-top-ten in the 2024 NFL Draft despite being the consensus top quarterback prospect in the country for two years. The Canon entry traces how the 2023 USC season — and one specific November loss to Utah — rewrote the trajectory of a player who, on November 1, 2023, was the heaviest Heisman favorite of any player since Lamar Jackson.

cohort_divergence.gap_label: STAT FOLKS UNDERWEIGHT IT · FANS REMEMBER IT MORE
cohort_divergence.discussion_starter: Was the 2023 USC collapse a coaching failure, a roster failure, or a Williams ceiling?
